title: verbascum × brockmuelleri
intro: Verbascum × brockmuelleri, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stature and large, yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × brockmuelleri lie in its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for wound healing, skin conditions, and ear infections. Mullein can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues, while its leaves and flowers can be smoked for their anti-inflammatory effects.
